title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 214.050 - Power to vacate streets vested in county commissions
text:
214.050.  Power to vacate streets vested in county commissions. — The county commissions of the several counties of this state are hereby vested with power to vacate any streets, avenues, thoroughfares or places heretofore dedicated, or which may hereafter be dedicated to public use in any cemeteries located within the respective borders of such counties.
(RSMo 1939 § 15272) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14063
